explanation: This command uses the same structure as the Sigma rule but omits unnecessary elements and uses standard syntax. It is a direct match for the detection rule.
Reorders the arguments of the New-Service command. The order of parameters does not affect the functionality or detection by the Sigma rule.
Substitutes '-BinaryPathName' with its short form '-bin', which is functionally equivalent and still matches the Sigma rule.
Uses an escaped character (`) to split 'New-Service' into 'N`ew-Service', which is still parsed correctly and matches the Sigma rule.
